changelogversion.changelogtext: Wired Recents preferences (outlineOnCovers, showDeleteButton) through library and browse component chains.
Added RecentsOptionsSheet with tabbed History, Updates, and Downloads controls.
Added outline on covers toggle to library display settings.
Replaced raw exception toasts with localized error messages throughout.
Fixed all Kotlin compiler warnings across app and core modules.
Beta releases now auto-publish with versioned APK names.
